General.Name: Huayu Expressway Group Ltd
General.Description: Huayu Expressway Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment, construction, operation, and management of infrastructure projects in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Qing Ping Expressway and Liquor and Spirits segments. The company constructs, operates, and manages the Qing Ping Expressway. It also distributes liquor and spirits under the Huamaojiu and Xijiushaofang brand names. Huayu Expressway Group Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Admiralty, Hong Kong. Huayu Expressway Group Limited is a subsidiary of Velocity International Limited.

4.Name: Mr. Ka Man  Sin FCCA, HKICPA
4.Title: Company Secretary
